files.scripts/install.sh:
git submodule update --init --recursive
rm -rf ./test/EFCore.Specification.Tests/CustomConvertersTestBase.cs
rm -rf ./test/EFCore.InMemory.FunctionalTests/CustomConvertersInMemoryTest.cs
dotnet build ./test/EFCore.Tests/EFCore.Tests.csproj -p:TreatWarningsAsErrors=false
